title: Garden Route Dam level update
description: GEORGE NEWS - The latest water update,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The latest water update, supplied by George Municipality on Tuesday 15 October:

- Dam level: 87,94%
- Rainfall: 4.5 mm (Measured rainfall figures from 8 - 14 October)

For water-saving tips please visit here.


> The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.


Photos: Dot Symons

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
